import { useState } from 'react' import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom' import { Link as ScrollLink } from "react-scroll"; import { NavContainer, NavLinksContainer, NavLinks, Hamburger } from './Nav.style' import Brand from "./Brand"; const Nav = () => { const [hamburgerState, setHamburgerState] = useState(false) const handleHamburgerClick = () => { setHamburgerState(!hamburgerState) } return ( setHamburgerState(false)} style={{ cursor: "pointer" }}>
  • setHamburgerState(false)}> Projects

    • ) } export default Nav
